message:
fix(validation): align id_format tests with hierarchical ID support

The is_valid_id_format function was updated to support:
- Max hash length of 40 (up from 25) for hierarchical IDs
- Dots in hash for child IDs (e.g., "bd-abc.1", "bd-abc.1.2")

This commit updates the test assertions to match the new limits:
- 26 char hashes are now valid (within max 40)
- New test for 41 char hashes (exceeds max 40)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
